channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Major Russian attack on Ukraine kills eight, wounds dozens
item.description: Mexican authorities are investigating a car crash that killed two US agents, reportedly CIA employees, after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab. The agents were not permitted to operate in Mexico.

item.title: Trump cancels U.S. envoys’ visit to Pakistan for talks; says 'does not mean restart of war'
item.description: Iran's Foreign Minister met Pakistan's Army chief and resumed commercial flights from Tehran's airport. Iran resumes commercial flights from Tehran’s international airport for the first time since the conflict with the U. S.

item.title: Fabulous Lives Of Cartel Wives: Women Masterminds Of Latin Drug Businesses
item.description: Women play a significant role in Latin American cartel operations, involved at every level. Their involvement is a well-documented aspect of the region's complex and multifaceted organized crime landscape. Women have been involved in every level of cartel operations.

item.title: Mexico says US agents killed in crash weren't permitted to operate there
item.description: The Mexican government claims that two US agents, reportedly CIA employees, were not authorized to operate in Mexico before their deaths in a car crash. The incident has raised questions about US activities on Mexican territory.

item.title: Rights groups critical as Venezuela prisoner release scheme 'coming to an end'
item.description: Venezuela's prisoner release scheme, implemented under an amnesty law, is nearing its end. Despite the releases, over 500 political prisoners remain incarcerated, sparking criticism from rights groups. More than 500 political prisoners are thought to still be in jail, despite the releases since the amnesty law was brought in.

item.title: Iran FM Says 'Yet To See If The US Is Truly Serious About Diplomacy'
item.description: US officials cancelled a trip to Pakistan for Iran talks, hours after Iranian Foreign Minister departed Islamabad. The decision was made by former US President Donald Trump, who had planned to send a delegation to Pakistan for diplomatic discussions with Iran.

item.title: Reported US CIA agents killed in crash not authorised to operate: Mexico
item.description: Mexico is seeking details from the US after a car crash killed two US agents, reportedly CIA employees, who were not authorized to operate in Mexico. The incident has raised concerns about US activities on Mexican territory.

item.title: Russia Targets Ukraine In Overnight Drone Attack, Parts Found In Romania
item.description: Russian drones crashed in Ukraine and Romania, prompting evacuations and a police cordon in Galati. The incident marks the latest escalation in the ongoing conflict between Russia and Ukraine. Details of the attack remain unclear.

item.title: Iran FM Abbas Araghchi and Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif meet in Pakistan
item.description: Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi met Pakistani PM Shehbaz Sharif in Islamabad to revive US talks. Iranian FM Araghchi met Pakistani PM Sharif in Islamabad as part of efforts to revive direct negotiations with the US.

item.title: Tottenham and West Ham both win, as heated battle to avoid relegation continues
item.description: Tottenham and West Ham both won their respective matches, maintaining their positions in the Premier League relegation battle. The victories came as a result of strong performances from both teams, with Tottenham defeating Southampton 3-1 and West Ham beating Everton 2-0.

item.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: 'Not worth 18-hr flight' - Trump calls off Witkoff
item.description: Trump cancelled a trip to Pakistan by US negotiators after Iran skipped talks. US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: 'Not worth 18-hr flight' - Trump calls off Witkoff, Kushner's Pak visit as Iran skips talks The Times of India.

item.title: Pentagon Floats Suspending Spain From NATO in Leaked Email Fallout
item.description: The Pentagon considered suspending Spain from NATO membership in a leaked email, citing concerns over the country's military cooperation with Russia. The proposal was reportedly made in response to Spain's decision to purchase Russian-made military equipment.

item.title: Palhinha scores late Tottenham goal at Wolves to end winless run
item.description: Palhinha scored a late goal for Tottenham at Wolves. The win ended Tottenham's winless run. Palhinha scores late Tottenham goal at Wolves to end winless run.

item.title: Trump cancels US negotiators’ trip to Pakistan for peace talks as Araghchi leaves Islamabad without
item.description: Trump cancelled US negotiators' trip to Pakistan as Iranian FM Araghchi left Islamabad. Trump cancels US negotiators’ trip to Pakistan for peace talks as Araghchi leaves Islamabad without.

item.title: 2 Missing, 1 Body, 1 Killer: In US University, Bangladeshi Students' Murder
item.description: One body was found at a US university where two Bangladeshi students are missing. Abugharbieh had studied at USF between 2021 and 2023. (HCSOSheriff). 2 Missing, 1 Body, 1 Killer: In US University, Bangladeshi Students' Murder.

item.title: Taliban Government says Afghans in Qatar can return 'with full confidence'
item.description: The Taliban government told Afghans in Qatar they can return with full confidence. The US aims to move Afghans to a third country. A U. S. A U. S.

item.title: Explosions and gunfire as armed groups launch co-ordinated attacks across Mali
item.description: Armed groups launched co-ordinated attacks across Mali, sparking explosions and gunfire in the centre and north. The attacks are described as the largest jihadist assault in years, with witnesses reporting clashes.

item.title: The 85-Year-Old Widow Snagged by Trump’s Immigration Crackdown
item.description: Marie-Thérèse Ross-Mahé, an 85-year-old French widow, was deported due to Trump's immigration crackdown. In her first interview since being deported, Marie-Thérèse Ross-Mahé, the French widow of a former G. I., recounted her experience in ICE detention.

item.title: Beijing Warns Europe As Chinese Entities Included In Russia Sanctions
item.description: China demands removal of its entities from Russia sanctions lists. China demanded an immediate removal of Chinese entities from the sanctions list. Beijing Warns Europe As Chinese Entities Included In Russia Sanctions.

item.title: Paris and Athens exchange mutual defense pledges amid geopolitical turmoil - politico.eu
item.description: Paris and Athens exchanged mutual defense pledges. Paris and Athens exchange mutual defense pledges amid geopolitical turmoil politico. eu. Paris and Athens exchange mutual defense pledges amid geopolitical turmoil - politico.
